news.title: Hardware testing startup Nominal hits $1B valuation, raises $155M in 10 months
news.summary: Nominal providers hardware testing equipment to defense tech companies. Founders Fund led the preemptive deal.

news.summary: The new feature goes beyond Roblox’s current text filter, which simply replaces banned words and phrases with the “#” symbol.

news.title: FYI: Impersonators are (still) targeting companies with fake TechCrunch outreach
news.summary: Fraudsters are impersonating TechCrunch reporters and event leads, and reaching out to companies. Here's what we're doing about it, and what you can look out for.

news.title: EXCLUSIVE: Luma launches creative AI agents powered by its new ‘Unified Intelligence’ models
news.summary: Luma introduced Luma Agents, powered by its new “Unified Intelligence” models, designed to coordinate multiple AI systems and generate end-to-end creative work across text, images, video and audio.

news.title: Google says half of all zero-days it tracked in 2025 targeted buggy enterprise tech
news.summary: Enterprise software was a major focus of zero-day activity during 2025, with security and networking devices, like firewalls, VPNs, and virtualization platforms among the most targeted by malicious hackers.
